Hero.title: IT Support / QA Tester
Hero.tagline: I ensure software quality through testing, automation, and attention to detail — delivering reliable systems you can trust.

About.heading: About Me
About.intro: I am a dedicated IT Support and QA Tester with a strong passion for Web Development. I bridge the gap between technical requirements and business expectations by delivering high-quality, bug-free applications. With a foundation in manual and automated testing, I strive to continuously improve development lifecycles.
